text: Being here, I am gripped by an odd mixture of anticipation and detachment. The clinical modernity of the space, the blue and violet glow of technology, and the experimental energy evoke curiosity but also a sense of alienation. I feel like I am on the threshold of something both promising and uncertain—an experiment in how humans relate to intelligent machines and structured environments. My mind drifts between excitement for innovation and self-conscious awareness of the staged, artificial context. I am a participant but also, inescapably, an observer of my own experience.
